payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's all good. So, last we left off, the Mighty Nein have been making their rounds in the city of Zadash, seeking opportunities, information, getting their bearings amongst the various townsfolk, streets, and what goings-on there are. Getting updates from town criers wandering through the roads, speaking with individuals, going into bathhouses where you met up with your fantastic long-lost barbarian. Yasha coming in to join alongside you guys in your exploits. You managed to converse with a meeting, or at least Beau and Fjord met with a meeting of unhappy denizens of the Empire discussing their frustrations beneath the Leaky Tap, and had crossed some information with them. You had gone and made some purchases. You had sold off a few of the things you had acquired in your journeys northward along the Amber Road. You had decided to, looking for work, go to the King's Hall, where they had a task board there and had taken one of the contracts that had been posted. You would be paid to seek the sewers beneath the city, near the outskirts of the Tri-Spire area of the town, for something that had been lurking within those tunnels below. A couple of guards had not returned; one had gone there and fled. You were promised a sum of money, should you be able to exterminate whatever this entity is and bring back proof of its demise. You jauntily accepted this. Before this happened, as a part of a journey towards this Tri-Spire, both Caleb and Jester made their way there, Caleb unsuccessfully entering a nicer district of the city that did not seem to believe or respect his presentation. Jester did so. She got a room at one of the hoity-toity inns in the district and was led to some mild disappointments. Where we left off, the two of you had reconvened and begun making your way back to meet up with the rest of your friends at the Leaky Tap tavern. Probably at a brief distance from each other as Caleb has huffed off, in a bit of frustration. Eventually, Caleb, you make your way to the familiar outside of the Leaky Tap. You enter, the fresh mud now a little bit less fresh and dried against your face, into the interior. At this point, it's mid-afternoon, there's maybe about, let's say, nine patrons in there, and a number of your friends who have been waiting for the two of you to return that are all sitting around a table and discussing amongst themselves. The rest of you guys look across and watch Caleb enter, and then a few moments after, Jester enters as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Let's have cruises soon.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Let's get our own Sea Org and we'll give out ranks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No! Nothing like Sea Org, please!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're just getting over being sick! No cruises!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, anybody have anything else they want to say or shall we dive in?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I like Girl Scout cookies.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. And on that note, let's go ahead and dive into tonight's episode of Critical Role! [click, TV static] [groovy Critical Role theme]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And wel-- (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I was going to say it, but I thought it was-- I'm out of practice!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For those who are unaware, Ashley just full-on ripcorded out of halfway-a-phrase and it was beautiful. It was adorable.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It could have been so many things.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'll get better at it again. Give me a minute.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You do. From Port Damali to the southern gates of the Empire and the Wuyun Gorge, on foot-- which you guys were traveling on foot-- it took you about the better part of two weeks. You passed through Nicodranas-- or you didn't pass through Nicodranas, but you went through along the road and skirted along the side. You took the road pretty much straight there, but it was quite a bit of travel on foot to get there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe Molly can do a seance and he'll come out!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, well he might get-- you know what? He might think that's really fun. That could be fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't normally speak with the dead on a first date, but we'll think about it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yasha, do you have any kind of communication with your--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I mean, I certainly don't see him in the flesh, so no.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But do you talk to him?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yes, of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Does he talk back?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Not exactly.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe you have to get somewhere really quiet, because the first time I heard the Traveler it was super duper quiet.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's a good idea, actually. That's a good idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fjord, can I ask you a question?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you remember how long it took us to get from Port Damali to the border into--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't think it was more than a few days. I don't recall exactly. Do I recall exactly?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's a very intricate key. It feels like a dense iron, but it's been gold leafed, or coated in some sort of reflective gold-like metal. It's very well made. It has little scrawlings on it, almost like a spiral in the center. The key itself--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's a sewer nexus with a beast with webs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So we're not having this room party?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're having the room party after the sewers.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, because we'll have bank and then we can get room service and shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But we'll have to get clean or else we won't get in there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I want to defile a very expensive shower.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's what I'm saying, is the sewer first because you are all going to be dirty like me.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And somebody else's hotel room will get us clean.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: If you're renting a room there, maybe they have to let us in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You also have to get in in order to rent the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think they only have to let me in, technically.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Did they give you a hall pass or something?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I have this key. It says Pillow Trove on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is it just a key or is there a thing that dangles from it, something we could mimic and make more of?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: From where you are now, it'd take you maybe the better part of 45 minutes, better part of an hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, yeah. Do we know where that guy is?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do we know where that guy is?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Which guy?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The guy that came running back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, or was there a guy that came back?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That Voloshin said that one of them ran back from the task.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you don't know anything. You can go back and try and ask for information on that, but you haven't met him or know anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I know one thing that's a photosensitive thing. If we need to make a fast escape I'd rather have some light maybe, if it's something like that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Daytime's better for that. Different environment.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Good thinking.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So is it better to go now or tomorrow morning?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How long does it take to get over to the Tri-Spire area, find us a manhole?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's late afternoon. You're probably about an hour and a half, two hours from sundown.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Which guy?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The guy that came running back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, or was there a guy that came back?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That Voloshin said that one of them ran back from the task.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you don't know anything. You can go back and try and ask for information on that, but you haven't met him or know anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I know one thing that's a photosensitive thing. If we need to make a fast escape I'd rather have some light maybe, if it's something like that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Daytime's better for that. Different environment.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Good thinking.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So is it better to go now or tomorrow morning?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How long does it take to get over to the Tri-Spire area, find us a manhole?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From where you are now, it'd take you maybe the better part of 45 minutes, better part of an hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is it early afternoon or late afternoon?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Late afternoon, you said?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The further north you go, yeah. This particular area is pretty chilly, especially since you're getting towards the end of fall. It's almost Harvest Close in two weeks. You guys are hitting winter in the very near future. You would know this, too, that snowfall is fairly common throughout the winter here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I would like to get something that is brown, muted, nothing gaudy. Probably don't have that anyway.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Not in this one, no. Your choices are pretty much brown, black, and gray, so you're good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll take the brown one. Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're good on that one. I do not recall if they had any pricing put down for cloaks.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's 50 gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 600 gold pieces, please. Eh, it falls under what would be general common clothes, so I'll put the cloak cost at two silver.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I have that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: A poor man could buy half a cloak. Half a cloak between them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: One of those shitty dueling shawls that they throw off?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Exactly.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I love it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Actually, what season is it? Are we north? Is it going to get cold?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's cold.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Perfect. Following that, the task board contract that you recovered and was assigned to you by the Herald of the Hall contains both the Writ of Lawmaster Intent, which is what will give you approval to travel into the sewer without being harried by the Crownsguard, and also gives you the location of the sewer that leads you there. Following the basic instructions and asking around, you eventually find yourselves at the corner of Ruen Road and Dewmist.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: One of those shitty dueling shawls that they throw off?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Exactly.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I love it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Actually, what season is it? Are we north? Is it going to get cold?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's cold.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The further north you go, yeah. This particular area is pretty chilly, especially since you're getting towards the end of fall. It's almost Harvest Close in two weeks. You guys are hitting winter in the very near future. You would know this, too, that snowfall is fairly common throughout the winter here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can you pick me up earmuffs?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Of course I can do that. I ask for the largest size they have and I get a woolen cap as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For both of those together? One silver piece.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, okay. I have that.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Are you going to take your ears and roll them?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That sounds amazing. I will do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Warren T. Rat in American Tail.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Two sponge rollers.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Well, I'm stationed here for the next several hours, so as long as you return--"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Stop with the nervous tics. Stop.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All I know is that apparently they lost a couple of guys down there and--"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I know that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "One of them was pissing himself and ran."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's still not information on the monster.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, be my guest." He pulls a key off of a ring and goes down to the latch on the metal bar that blocks off the entry and pulls it open.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What guard was it that ran away?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I don't fucking know! There's a lot of them around here!"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do you know how they were killed? Did anybody see any wounds?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "They never recovered the body."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: They never recovered the body.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: They're probably eaten completely by now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, you're welcome to go down there and continue."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are all the sewer grates blocked with a lock?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes, to prevent folks from wandering into them."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, but how will we get out?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "I don't think so. We haven't had any heavy rainfall. I haven't been able to hear more than a trickle down there for a number of weeks."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, you're welcome to go down there and continue."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are all the sewer grates blocked with a lock?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes, to prevent folks from wandering into them."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, but how will we get out?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, I'm stationed here for the next several hours, so as long as you return--"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: To this one?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "To this one. You'll be fine."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What if we get trapped at another one and then we can't get out?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, start shouting. Keep that writ on hand and if there's any crownsguard that hear you, they'll probably be able to let you out."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Seems reasonable enough.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is there a way to navigate the sewer systems? Any markings we should look out for?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm going to be honest, I haven't been down there. It smells real bad."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do you know if the sewers flooded any time during the day? Any sort of unexpected water flows?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: There's a bunch up in the hall around you right now. As you throw the ball bearing and it hits, some of it breaks away, and you see horrible matted fur. There's a flash in the torchlight where you see two eyes reflect through, and you hear this sound (shriek). You watch as fangs open up, and a bunch of the other clusters of gathered refuse all suddenly begin to shift and skitter in your direction. I need you all to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I bet that's where we need to go. It's blocked.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Can I touch a little bit of the webbing with the flame?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure. You bring the torch to the webbing and watch as it burns away in a few seconds and turns to ash and dust. There's also a very faint scratching sound.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm activating one. I'm pulling a hand down one of my swords and I'm getting it to light up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You activate one of them. As it lights up, you bring the torch around to look.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Putting my goggles on.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to go ahead and cast Armor of Agathys, get on the spectral frost armor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As the armor filters up onto you, the weird, warm, humid air of the sewer interior seems to crystallize against your armor. The ice that normally gives a translucent bluish-white color has a strangely yellow-green tint to it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Poop-mist!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's the snowcone variety.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: As I see everybody doing this, I'm going to take a big swig of liquor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You take a quick swig. You guys look out in the distant tunnels and you see nothing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Scratching sound's a rat and we're all like (whimper).

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (squeaking)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's funny. As you glance down at the ground, though, one of those small clusters of refuse shifts a little bit. And shifts again.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (whispering) What is it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I take a ball bearing--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Poke it with your stick!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I say little. It's a few feet across. They've gotten larger as you've progressed on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to take a ball bearing and ping it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How close is it to us?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: For initiative here, guys, let's start with 25 to 20. Anyone?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I say little. It's a few feet across. They've gotten larger as you've progressed on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to take a ball bearing and ping it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How close is it to us?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's a bunch up in the hall around you right now. As you throw the ball bearing and it hits, some of it breaks away, and you see horrible matted fur. There's a flash in the torchlight where you see two eyes reflect through, and you hear this sound (shriek). You watch as fangs open up, and a bunch of the other clusters of gathered refuse all suddenly begin to shift and skitter in your direction. I need you all to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: (exclaiming)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're fighting poop-rats!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's a hairball.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's what happens when I roll one that I haven't been charging up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yep, yep. It's definitely because of that. Look at this sewer! Is that real wet?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It just looks wet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's like resin.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We had you guys up here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's actual shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Matt is very committed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's reality seeping into our game a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no! See, Caleb, look, you should've been in the middle of us!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All of these sewer-faring giant rats begin to rush towards you. Their fur seems to have, over time, merged with other bits of discarded debris and matter, causing this outer shell of broken garbage, trash, and excrement that protects them and gives this look of a horrible, half-burned pile of compost with teeth and fur rushing in your direction. On that note.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I love that we're fighting rats right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I know! It's so Baldur's Gate. I love it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (chanting) Level three!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, that ends your turn then, right? All right, it's now their turn. This one is going to shift around, painfully limping to get down and try to bite out towards your legs. This one's going to move, still in combat with you, and go after-- actually no, because you punched it, it's going to continue after you. This one is going to come after you as well, since you rushed up in its way. So the one coming after Beau. That is going to be a 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do I get-- I don't because I moved-- do I get a bonus action? (mumbling) Still trying to figure this out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is the torch in your punching hand?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's not a light weapon, it's not a weapon you can off-hit with it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Can I just touch it? Set it aflame?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You could've if that was your action, but you've already punched it. However, you did straight up rush up and cold-cock deck a sewer rat in the face. Once again, you feel the crunching right behind it as it falls over and gets back up, its jaw's hanging off to one side, and it has this horrible gurgling sound as it screams at you. A combination of this reddish blood and whatever putrid green liquid is mixing and pouring out of its mouth.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I move my cloak to--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, that ends your turn then, right? All right, it's now their turn. This one is going to shift around, painfully limping to get down and try to bite out towards your legs. This one's going to move, still in combat with you, and go after-- actually no, because you punched it, it's going to continue after you. This one is going to come after you as well, since you rushed up in its way. So the one coming after Beau. That is going to be a 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do I get-- I don't because I moved-- do I get a bonus action? (mumbling) Still trying to figure this out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is the torch in your punching hand?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's not a light weapon, it's not a weapon you can off-hit with it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Can I just touch it? Set it aflame?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You could've if that was your action, but you've already punched it. However, you did straight up rush up and cold-cock deck a sewer rat in the face. Once again, you feel the crunching right behind it as it falls over and gets back up, its jaw's hanging off to one side, and it has this horrible gurgling sound as it screams at you. A combination of this reddish blood and whatever putrid green liquid is mixing and pouring out of its mouth.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I move my cloak to--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You have two attacks with the light weapon on the side, technically. Eh, I'll allow it. It's fine, go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think so.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you finish coughing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait! Yeah, I don't want to use that just yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, then Molly, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I see the mess this is making, and I'm going to turn around and I'm holding the sword, but I'm going to punch with the hilt of my sword.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it. Which one are you going up to, the one that Beau kicked earlier?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, the one that attacked Yasha.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, go for it. Roll a d20 and add your strength bonus.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Plus my strength, my non-existent strength modifier. That's a 12 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 12 just hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's one damage!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You deal one point of damage to that one. As you reach down and sock it in the head--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I can take a bonus attack though, and I'm going to hit it again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, are you attacking with your--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, I'm using my other hand, since technically I have two attacks, it's not two--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Seven, okay. You carve through and a large part tears through before your handaxe stops and you're like (grunts) can't push any more. You try and pull back and as you do, you pull your arm back and it gets ripped from your grasp and it's now stuck and folded, and your handaxe is now wobbling in the web.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Unimpeded to the point it would be an issue.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Not tacky.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you feel a little bit of stickiness when you step around from general fallen bits of stray webbing strands and such, but nothing that would impede your movement.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How is it to try to chop through it with the axe?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can go try to either the one behind you or the one ahead.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I want to try doing it and see if it sticks to the weapon or if it cuts through.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: To the one ahead?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You come forth to the web there in front of you to where the two other figures that are massed there. They are both humanoid and you now look over at a close glance as a third one, small, looks to be another one of the rat creatures that is caught in there. You carve through. Go ahead and make an attack roll. Roll damage for the handaxe.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Seven.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I need you all to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: They're not fresh.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They're not fresh.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do I see puncture wounds?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do not.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Also, there's this weird sense that creeps on Nott and Fjord as you're glancing forward and you both turn over your shoulder to see a massive pale white and blue arachnid creature, legs spindling outward, at a width of ten feet or more. Giant dripping fangs and beady red eyes, a row of them glaring right at you as this (hiss) pincers open up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How close is it to you guys?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's right behind Fjord and Nott and it is striking you, Fjord, as its first strike.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It snuck up on us?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Wait, so it's behind?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's literally here!

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Oh!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Was it on the ceiling the whole time?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is going to be a 23 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Against my 14? Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: While this death is happening, Caleb is Schmidt go like this to the halfling. Caleb's going, "Hey guy, hey hey hey."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Halfling!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You suffer seven points of piercing damage, as its fangs snap right into your chest area. Do you still have ice armor on?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I do, so he takes ten points of damage. The armor is gone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I also need you to make a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Shit! 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You feel venom pulse into your body. Your physicality, however, being somewhat sturdy, manages to resist a large element of the poison that is suddenly thrust into your torso. You take-- that's a terrible roll. You take five points of poison damage. Nott, you look up and see this thing as it digs its giant pincers and fangs into Fjord's body and it pulls back and you watch it vanish and disappear.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fuck!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As the fangs dig into the side of your torso, you pull back and try and defend yourself and it pierces your leather armor in your torso. It releases a huge burst of venom into your chest. You feel your lungs and heart seize for a moment and you almost fall back. That burning orcish rage from underneath gives you that last bit of inspiration to shrug off the poison and look back angrily and realize you are in deep shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Where?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh fuck!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Well, he's not invisible anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It lunges out towards you again.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, no. Shit, that's another 23. Two 19s in a row.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I mean, you don't need me to tell you it hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is eight points of piercing damage, and I need you to make a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Damn!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How many?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay, constitution saving throw. Oh, that's an eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's a lot of dice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, you take 15 points of poison damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's all of the poison damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm unconscious. No! Relentl-- The thing, I got the thing! It's called Relentless Endurance! I come back to one hit point!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's Relentless!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, I'm half dead.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's been bothering you this whole time?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's Relentless!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, I'm half dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As the fangs dig into the side of your torso, you pull back and try and defend yourself and it pierces your leather armor in your torso. It releases a huge burst of venom into your chest. You feel your lungs and heart seize for a moment and you almost fall back. That burning orcish rage from underneath gives you that last bit of inspiration to shrug off the poison and look back angrily and realize you are in deep shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh fuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There you go, Freemasons. He's actually a half orc.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty, that ends its turn. That brings us to Beau and Molly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you want to go first?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You can go first.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is there a way I can hop over the web situation?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Is it bothering you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All righty. It's now the spider's turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (counting) That'll improve your sight there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so I am going to steady my arm against the other arm and point at it, and blacken my hand and send a Fire Bolt at it. Here it goes, we'll see if it hits probably not. No, I don't think it does. That is a 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That unfortunately does not hit. As it's reacting from the impacts, it begins to rear back, and as it does there's this one flash of light. It seems like it notices its presence and gets really low and flat suddenly. Its whole body, which is massive, shrinks low to the sewer as it passes overhead. It pops back up, ready.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Then before the end of my turn I'm going to (snapping) and Schmidt silently comes up as close as he can get next to me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That ends your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ja.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It now sees you all moving around it, and it looks like it's been hurting. You watch as its form vanishes.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You take, from the fangs as it lurches towards you, oof, that's going to be 11 points of piercing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Halved.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, because you're raging. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You take five points of piercing damage, and I need you to make a constitution saving throw, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You've got this.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Woo, crit on that shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As it lurches forward and slams its fangs in the collar bone area, you having no real armor to protect it, you take it head on. The fangs sink and you feel the venom pulse through your torso, through your arms. The burning pains goes through and you flex it off. As you do so, thankfully reducing what would have been-- you only take 11 points of poison damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yasha is a heavy metal album. That's pretty dope.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I'll tell you what. I'll give you the attack, you'll have disadvantage, and if you miss, you're prone. But I'll give you the attack if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A total of nein?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. No, just nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So (fwoosh), and as you throw your orb, it skitters up the wall. You almost hit it, but it pulls out of the way before it shatters, the orb splattering acid across the stonework, burning through whatever outer layer of thick liquid has congealed there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: From where I'm hidden to where it was when it appeared, how far is that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From where it appeared? That would've been 40 feet from you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So I have to roll with disadvantage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you do.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, not as good. 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Goes wide, no impact, unfortunately. That ends the spider's turn. Beau, Molly, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ugh. Can I close the gap? With my 40 foot movement?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (counting)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's above you on the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Throw your throwing stars!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Like I'm trying to get spiders out of the corner ceiling with a broomstick! Exactly.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I'll tell you what. I'll give you the attack, you'll have disadvantage, and if you miss, you're prone. But I'll give you the attack if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A total of nein?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. No, just nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So (fwoosh), and as you throw your orb, it skitters up the wall. You almost hit it, but it pulls out of the way before it shatters, the orb splattering acid across the stonework, burning through whatever outer layer of thick liquid has congealed there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: From where I'm hidden to where it was when it appeared, how far is that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From where it appeared? That would've been 40 feet from you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So I have to roll with disadvantage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you do.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, not as good. 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Goes wide, no impact, unfortunately. That ends the spider's turn. Beau, Molly, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ugh. Can I close the gap? With my 40 foot movement?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (counting)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's above you on the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Throw your throwing stars!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Like I'm trying to get spiders out of the corner ceiling with a broomstick! Exactly.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Oh god! (panicked breathing)." He starts looking around, looking up at the faint bit of light now, which it's now just passing sunset. You see a little bit of purple light coming through, and through the little bits of webbing, you can see the grate that leads outside. He goes, "I don't know how I got here."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I put my hand on his head and cast Cure Wounds?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Go ahead and roll for the hit points regained there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Now. 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Actually, since I see that Jester has this covered, I'm going to start burning out the dead people and rooting through their pockets and stuff.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll still stick with Jester, though. Just in case he's--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's a moment after you finish casting it where the halfling shakes the head. "What's going on?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Blessed child. You are alive. Your saviors have come.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You see one eye is almost still glued shut from webbing that's across the front of it, but he's trying to open it. "I don't understand. What's going on?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're safe now!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You stuff it all in there. Beyond that, going through them, for the sake of brevity here, you find an additional 85 gold pieces, 210 silver, and 45 copper.
payload.trigger_phrase: you find an additional 85 gold pieces

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do find another pair of studded leather armor that has like a sea motif to it. There's shells pressed into it, and a wave pattern on the edges. The person it's attached to has a bunch of tattoos across their body as well, that insinuate a lot of time at sea, different names of different ships that are different points of faded on the body. They may have been a sailor at some point in their life and has expired under here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I will quietly gather that up and put it into my bag.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Well, the armor's a full set, so it'll--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Am I able to carry that? I don't even know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I mean, it's a leather chest plate, leather arm bands and bracers, and then leg plates as well, so it's a full set. You could probably fit all that into your bag if it's the only thing that's in your bag.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Well, he's checked all his things, and he goes, "Okay, I thank you all so much for your help. I really appreciate it. You've saved my life."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, but we're all of the same breed; we get what you're doing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You know I'm looking, but you don't know what I found.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We know you're going to lie about it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, because everyone is so lovely, can you tell me--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Gold pieces. 210 silver, and 45 copper.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Vex never lied about the loot we found.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't give a fuck what Vex did.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Never once. Never once, for all the shit she got for being greedy, she never once lied about the loot.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: She was a good person.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, but she was a horrible person.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's true.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: She's a terrible half-elf.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Vex is retired in Whitestone right now. She's not here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm sensing a lingering sibling rivalry.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know. It's carried over.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hanging over the table.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm clearly Lawful Good. Clearly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What's Thed doing?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Anyway. I bid you all adieu." He pulls his hood up over his head and his little halfling feet quickly carry him back in the direction where you guys travel the sewer.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What's your name?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: His name was Thed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Of course, friend, we've never seen you before in our entire life.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "As I haven't seen you, either."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I didn't take anything from your pockets. I really didn't.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Does anything about his tattoo irritate me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's not very well done.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You know what I mean.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. No.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You really do have like a key to the grates, like an extra one?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I mean-- " He looks up behind him and says, "I've got mine, but I need it for my work."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's fair.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Pretty sure we can call for someone with our--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He glances over towards Nott and says, "Unless I'm mistaken, it appears you have a female friend here who could probably help you get around that anyway."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I could try.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As you climb up, Nott, and look through, the sun has set, and the night has gone purple to dark, navy blue as night has taken it. You glance up through and you're looking out into a dark alleyway. You see two sides of an alley, shaded and dark. About maybe 25 feet ahead, it opens up into a fine cobblestone road. You can see fine buildings across the way, you see the lanterns are light in the center of the town. You have not been to this part of the town, but it's pretty well kept, and no one seems to be immediately around to hear you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm just waiting.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys have reconvened, you've gathered your things, the spider has been-- all the legs have been pulled up and wrapped and you have either Beau's staff or something else to lift it with on both sides, because it's pretty heavy, it's going to take two of you to carry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right, we'll carry it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It would have to be you two, it's pretty strong. The two of you lift it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Are we the strongest?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my gosh, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So where are you guys going?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Because you have a big lollipop to carry.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We've got to go up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Up these things, into the money pot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So. Who's going first?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nott?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, somebody that can talk to the guards.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know, guys. All right, I'll try. (shouting) Hello? We're stuck down here, and we want to come up. Let us out of the sewers. Let us up!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah, it's sundown. I'd say with the time it took you to scavenge the bodies, about 30 or 40 minutes after the sun's set completely.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Nothing from me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you all eventually gather up at the top, street side. It's completely dark, the night sky is above you, you can see the warm lantern light across the various street intersections, and along the path in front of the various buildings. You definitely recognize this, Jester. This is indeed the Tri-Spires district.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hey you guys, this is where my hotel is.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Well, wasn't the plan to have a, what did you call it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) Room party!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What time of the day is it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is night, it is freshly night.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But what time of the day is it, because I know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Party time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Very, very close to what time it is. I know sundown, sunup.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah, probably. I mean, in this district, shops are still open past sundown for a little bit, but the later in the evening it gets, many of them close down. Some shops stay open later, you don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hey you guys, this is where my hotel is.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Well, wasn't the plan to have a, what did you call it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) Room party!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What time of the day is it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is night, it is freshly night.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But what time of the day is it, because I know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Party time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Very, very close to what time it is. I know sundown, sunup.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's sundown. I'd say with the time it took you to scavenge the bodies, about 30 or 40 minutes after the sun's set completely.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What time does the sun set?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh Jesus Christ. Garmin over here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are you trying to figure out if the stores are still open?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Does it look dark? Of course I am.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We can't ask Siri here, we don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's the feat I took. It's Siri. Does it look like stores are open? That's all I'm asking.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: He goes to the other guards, "Go down there, double check, make sure everything is good, go." Eventually you watch as another guard is brought in. He has a night shirt on, and he looks like he was woken up, he's a little drowsy. "What's going on, I-- oh! That thing, that's the thing!" He looks immediately scared. He goes, "Great, send him back to bed. Well, that's what we needed."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you might want to send someone to collect your dead too, by the by.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Quite a few.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You bring him in. Some more of the guards begin to gather around and then Voloshin is pulled from his interior office somewhere. As he steps forward he says, "All right, they tell me--oh, goodness me! That's a beastie." He tugs on the end of his chin beard for a second. "So this is it, this is the one?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Indeed, in fact it would turn invisible when it wasn't trying to stick its fangs into all of our gang.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) "Someone wake up Cloen!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Who the hell is Cloyde?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Cloen, and he was the one survived--"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Cloyde?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Cloen.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Cloyne?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Cloine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Clo-en.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That is not what I heard at all.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: With that accent, all those letters disappear.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's also an egg sac that got taken care of.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my gosh, lots and lots and lots of baby spiders.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "700 gold pieces. Hand me the writ, please. Thank you very much, and I appreciate that," and he sets it out and hands it to you. "So. You seem able-bodied. You've pulled through on something where few have been able to. If you're looking for more work, I'm sure we'll have things. Bit light at the moment, but where can we find you, if we're looking for you?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Beau!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't tell them about the bag.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Stop it, we're about to get our reward, stop being a shithead right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, fair.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "If you would be as kind to remember these fallen soldiers who protect you and the people of this city, by delivering unto us the armor and weaponry that they had been lost with, I would be happy to go forward with delivering your reward."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Who picked up all those items, anyway?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I have them. Here's two sets of armor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Two of the guards collect them.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And two extra helmets.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Side note  I did not come in this building. I'm hanging back and giving Identify a whirl on what's in my bag. That other armor. Outside.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Travis will never see that card.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He comes back. They bring a small chest.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The card that says "give to Travis."

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's a darker gray, but elements of where it's been pressed in with leather scrolling, designed to look almost like waves curling on the outer parts of the different leather plates, have a very faint turquoise inlay color on the inside that you can only see when it's directly lit. It looks like a very beautiful set of leather armor. There's no arms to it, other than the bracer plates right there, there's no sleeve. There you go. It's got an arm guard and a bracer there, shoulder piece, the torso portion, a couple of plates that go over that, and some leg guards.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't trust you yet. I don't trust any of these people yet, except for-- No, I don't trust any of these people yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's too bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ja. I've made mistakes in my life. I've harmed people. Not in a long time. You know, I thought I was going to be something, someday, a long time ago, and now I don't. Oh, god. Ask me again in a couple of days. I will prepare an answer that is better than this for you, I promise.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sure. You know, we've all harmed people, but I hope that you will learn to trust me, in time, and I appreciate you sharing that. Here, I'm fairly certain that you will do far more damage with this than my shitty attempt did.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Of course. Thanks for the armor. What does it look like? (laughter)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: In your house. They have one washroom for the multitude of rooms the entire tavern has, and the water is changed every few hours, maybe. That's what I'm saying. But it's functional.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We went to the bathhouse to get clean?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you went back to The Leaky Tap.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: By the way, part of the reason I didn't wash up at The Leaky Tap is because, in medieval times, they didn't have baths. I thought, this isn't the Sheraton, they don't have a bath.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're pretending that there's a bath.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This isn't medieval times. In the fantasy world, it's a weird mixture of different time periods, and when I say they have a washroom, I mean it's a basin with water that is replaced every couple hours that people communally come up and wash in. It's not the cleanest water, and it's probably been used by other people as well, and if you bathe fully in it, it might be changed before the next two or three people use it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I was under the assumption that you had to be de Rolo level to have a bath in your house.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: (sighing) "Listen. If you indeed have a heart for goodness in this world, and you want to make a difference, we're moving on to something soon that I think we could use your aid on. You and your companions. Blast, if you need payments, I've got coin I can muster, and I see you do work for coin. I have few others of us who can chip in as well. Other than myself, most of the Knights of Zadash are unskilled in the ways of the arm. We're willing to raise a voice, but not much of a fist, or backing up a word with strength. I'm willing to make it worth your time." "You don't have to answer now. Tomorrow at midnight, me and a few others from the group, the decision makers, we're meeting back down here. If you're in, bring your friends, we can all talk. Give you more information about what's going on, and you can say yes or no at your leisure. But I think we have a chance to really do something good in this city. To change part of the status quo. To root out some of the unworthy at the top. Think on it."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, we come from all sorts of different backgrounds. I happen to be very handy at sea, know my way around a merchant area. Beau?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I consider being curious a pretty high skill set, but since you're asking beyond that. I'm pretty good with this here bo. Pretty good fighter. Named Beau. It's a little redundant, to be totally honest.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's a little strange, not going to lie."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's kind of obnoxious.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yeah."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sometimes it irritates me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Understood."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Curse upon ye who made that decision for you."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can't pick them. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "So you can move quickly, without a ruckus, you say?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: At times, we can be quite quiet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "And your friends, do they share our sentiments?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I would say it's safe to say that they don't have sentiments opposed to yours.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Indifference is a pretty strong sentiment.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: For the sake of brevity? Since it's getting late and I want us to get to a good ending point tonight, they will let you in but nobody else.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, we can go back to the Pillow Trove and all hang out and sleep in the same room if you want.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Wait, so we all just got clean and we're going to get back into the sewers to get to the Tri-Spires?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is this room that you rented gigantic?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, it's kind of little, actually. You guys, it's really little, actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But really nice, you said?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But you paid for it!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You paid for it! You know, you don't want it to go to waste. There's probably a very nice sitting room or tavern or something underneath this place. It's a shame to let it go to waste.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah we all look nice enough, they might let us in. If not, let's all go--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Kill them.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What? What?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm kidding.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sure, we walk back to the guards and I show them the key. Can we get in?
